findings.justification: Owned durable runtime-context session workflow: one execution per context attempt, parks on Workflow.suspend while waiting for session input signals, owns adapter lifecycle start/send/deregister.
Owned durable permission wait workflow: records the permission request, parks on the decision signal, then relays the decision back to the owning runtime-context session workflow.
Tool dispatch is operation-shaped but intentionally owns at-most-once durable tool execution via Workflow idempotency + Activity memoization, then relays through the ToolExecutor/session signal seam.
Owned durable scheduled-prompt workflow: records a schedule commitment and parks on DurableClock.sleep until the owned wake time.
Owned durable webhook-fact observer workflow: parks on the webhook-fact signal and then reads the corresponding owned fact row written before signal delivery.
Owned durable peer-event observer workflow: parks on the peer-event signal and then reads the corresponding owned peer-event row written before signal delivery.

Reviewed MCP-entry Shape D tool-dispatch owner workflow: one execution per toolUseId, uses Workflow idempotency and Activity memoization for at-most-once tool execution, then returns the synchronous MCP tools/call result without a relay.
